digest.component_or_area: autolander landing loop (fresh-Verified await + atomic submit)
propositions: Before submit, every chain member must carry a fresh Verified +1 on its own post-rebase SHA, since rebase:chain mints a distinct new patchset per member; submitting otherwise lands an untested tree and violates R5.
Await for fresh Verified is bounded by a configurable timeout (default 30 min matching land); on timeout the stack is handed back rather than blocking forever.
Ancestor-atomic submit is a single POST to the chain tip that submits members together by relation-chain ancestry, reinforced by the shared topic and change.submitWholeTopic.
After submit, the loop must verify every stack member reached MERGED; any member left open is a partial land that fails loudly (AUTOLANDER_ERROR + metric) and hands the stack back.
On full-merge success, associated tickets are closed/annotated via import rebar ticket ops.
A live end-to-end run landed a real single-change stack merged by the bot, exercising the rebase, fresh-Verified await, and atomic submit path against the deployed Gerrit instance.
